description: Learn the principles of project management, procurement, leadership and decision-making through interactive reading modules and scenario-based quizzes.

topics.title: Project Initiation
topics.description: Learn why projects are initiated, how organizations evaluate investments and how projects are formally authorized.

topics.title: Stakeholder Analysis
topics.description: Identify stakeholders, analyze their influence and develop effective engagement strategies.

topics.title: Project Success & The Project Manager
topics.description: Understand what defines project success and the leadership responsibilities of the Project Manager.

topics.title: Scope Management
topics.description: Learn how project scope is defined, validated and controlled throughout the project lifecycle.

topics.title: Time Planning
topics.description: Learn how projects are scheduled, monitored and controlled to achieve timely delivery.

topics.title: Cost Planning & Budgeting
topics.description: Estimate, budget and control project costs while balancing value and financial constraints.

topics.title: Project Crashing
topics.description: Evaluate schedule compression techniques and determine when crashing creates value.

topics.title: Procurement Planning
topics.description: Learn how procurement supports project success through sourcing, contracts and supplier selection.

topics.title: Contract Management
topics.description: Understand contract types, administration and supplier relationships throughout the project.

topics.title: Project Governance
topics.description: Explore governance structures, decision authority and accountability in projects.
